articles.title: Dogecoin Will Ignite 58% Breakout if It Takes Out Crucial Resistance, According to Crypto Trader Scott Melker
articles.description: Crypto analyst and trader Scott Melker is sharing his Dogecoin (DOGE) analysis, teasing the possibility of a significant DOGE breakout. Melker tells his nearly 500,000 Twitter followers that if DOGE can surpass its immediate resistance at $0.26, the asset could surge 58% toward $0.38. Dfinity Criticized Over Internet Computer Fork Proposal
articles.description: Dfinity faced criticism for its proposal to create a fork of the Internet Computer, a move that has sparked concerns within the community regarding potential fragmentation and the implications for the platform's future. Critics argue that the proposal could undermine the integrity and cohesion of the ecosystem, prompting debates about the best path forward for the technology.

articles.title: Aave to Launch Institutional Lending Markets This Month
articles.description: Aave is set to launch its institutional lending markets this month, expanding its offerings to cater to institutional investors. This initiative aims to provide tailored financial solutions and enhance liquidity within the decentralized finance (DeFi) ecosystem. The move reflects Aave's commitment to bridging traditional finance with the emerging DeFi space.

articles.description: Input Output Hong Kong, one of the companies behind the Cardano blockchain, is expanding the Cardano ecosystem through partnerships with Nexo, a cryptocurrency lending platform and decentralized finance liquidity aggregator Orion Protocol. articles.title: Elrond to Launch Gold and Silver Backed DeFi
articles.description: Elrond has gone into partnership with U.K. fintech firm Aurus that facilitates the tokenization of precious metals and commodities. The post Elrond to Launch Gold and Silver Backed DeFi appeared first on BeInCrypto.
